description: The TextureRefEditor component is commonly used in inspectors for materials and other components that use images/textures.

fields._targetRef: The field to make a visual for.
fields._drive: The field to drive with the contents of ``_targetRef`` or a placeholder texture if null.
fields._openInspectorButton: The button to open an inspector for ``_targetRef``.
fields._copyTextureButton: The button to copy the texture in ``_targetRef``.
fields._pasteTextureButton: The button to paste a texture into ``_targetRef``.
fields._referenceText: The field to drive with the description of the contents of ``_targetRef``.
fields._infoText: The field to drive with the info of ``_targetRef``.
fields._isNormalMap: Whether ``_targetRef`` should be interpreted as a normal map.

methods.ClearReference: Called when the reference ``_targetRef`` is cleared via the UI button.
methods.OpenInspectorButton: Called when an inspector is asked to be opened through this component for ``_targetRef``.
methods.CopyTexture: Called when a copy texture is called through this component for ``_targetRef``.
methods.PasteTexture: Called when the user asks to paste a texture into ``_targetRef`` through this component.
methods.SetTexture: Called when the texture for ``_targetRef`` is set through this component.

usage: Commonly used in inspectors. Using inspector specific components is a common tactic in Ref Hacking.
